The '''''Scylla''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] shortly after the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. This ship was almost captured during a [[Battle of Columus (Galactic Civil War)|battle]] against [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], who used a pair of [[CC-7700 frigate/Legends|CC-7700 frigates]] to keep it from escaping into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. In an act of desperation, Daala took out one of the frigates by ramming the ''Scylla'' into it. This allowed Daala to jump into hyperspace—but also severely damaged the ''Scylla's'' navigational systems. Daala's jump was a blind one, and she wasn't seen until the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] at least twenty years later to help out [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Scylla|Scylla]] is a creature from Greek mythology.
